During the the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], at some point between [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] and [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], [[Kligson's Moon/Legends|Kligson's Moon]] was '''attacked''' by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==History==
[[Kligson's Moon/Legends|Kligson's Moon]], also known as Droid World, was a mobile [[Space station/Legends|space station]] inhabited by the [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] [[Kligson/Legends|Kligson]] and the many [[Droid/Legends|droids]] that he had rescued. Due to its high level of technology, it was targeted by the [[Anti-droid sentiment/Legends|technophobic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

However, the Yuuzhan Vong were repelled by the [[Iron Knight]]s.<ref name="Droids" />

{{Battle-stub}}
